key_evidence: FTC and 11 states reached $100M settlement for deceptive pay practices in Spark Driver gig delivery program
Walmart showed drivers inflated base pay and tip amounts, then quietly reduced pay after acceptance since 2021
Falsely claimed 100% of customer tips went to drivers when they often did not
10-year FTC compliance monitoring and annual reporting now required
Correction forced by federal enforcement, not voluntary — up to $79M directed to harmed drivers
